name: Stewed Tomatoes and Celery
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the tomatoes and celery in a large pot.
2. Add salt and pepper to taste.
3. Cover with water or broth, if desired.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium-high heat.
5. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the celery is tender.
6. Stir in butter (or other fat) and serve. This is an excellent way to use the outer stalks of celery that are less desirable for serving raw.
